title: [PATCH]: Unified workflow for both "Latest News" and "Recent Apps" README sections
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Tidying the front page
gist.blurb: We've streamlined how our GitHub README gets updated with the latest news and community apps. Everything now runs smoothly on a single daily schedule.
gist.summary: Consolidated the GitHub Actions workflows for updating the 'Latest News' and 'Recent Apps' sections of the README into a single daily job.
gist.impact: This reduces CI clutter and ensures the repository's front page stays consistently up-to-date with community highlights.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee organizing a giant digital bulletin board (README) with the help of the monitor robot. The board has sections for 'News' and 'Apps'. The robot is holding a daily schedule.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot organizing a large wooden bulletin board. The board has glowing pixel-font text reading 'README'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
